title: Idle stop → container stopped after 48h inactivity
evidence: ✓ tests/integration/tc-010.test.ts (2 tests) 1747ms - TC-010: idle tenant (49h) → stop called, status=STOPPED, TENANT_STOPPED audit with actor=scheduler - TC-010: recent tenant (47h) → NOT stopped, status remains ACTIVE 319/319 total tests passed across 46 test files.
